title: KiroRails Spec Validator
description: Validate spec completeness when spec files are created or saved
instructions:
Check if this spec file has all required sections:
- For requirements.md: Summary, Acceptance criteria, Constraints
- For bugfix.md: Reproduction steps, Expected behavior, Actual behavior
- For design.md: Approach, Components affected, Risks, Rollback strategy
- For tasks.md: At least one task with Description, Files, Done criteria, Commit message
Flag vague done criteria like 'works correctly'. Report missing sections as warnings.
